description: "Review and optimize data storage, data models, and semantic models in a Microsoft Fabric lakehouse. Use when: optimize, review performance, tuning, best practices."
agent: "fabric-optimization-review"
tools: [vscode, execute, read, agent, browser, edit, search, web, 'fabric-mcp/*', todo]
